intent: Single-screen Hausrat damage report: incident date, incident-type select, free-form description (textarea) and an optional photo upload submitted via a single primary action.
notes: Tier-1 insurance baseline: minimum viable damage-report mask. Mixes a date-bounded input with a categorical SELECT_FIELD, a TEXT_INPUT carrying semanticKind=textarea (max-length validation) and a TEXT_INPUT carrying semanticKind=file_upload (size and format validations). semanticKind hints surface mask elements that the runtime cannot infer from nodeType alone and unblock cross-modal faithfulness against the rendered screen.
